name: Vitra Design Museum Shop
description: A carefully curated selection of design objects, furniture miniatures, and architecture books housed within the Vitra campus. The shop itself is a showcase of contemporary design thinking, offering pieces from both established and emerging designers.

name: Livraria Lello
description: One of the world's most beautiful bookstores, featuring a stunning neo-Gothic interior with an iconic crimson staircase. Built in 1906, the building itself is an architectural masterpiece that inspired J.K. Rowling's vision of Hogwarts.

name: MUJI Ginza
description: MUJI's flagship store in Tokyo's Ginza district occupies an entire building designed to embody the brand's philosophy of simplicity and essentialism. The space includes a MUJI Hotel, restaurant, and extensive product floors showcasing the intersection of design and daily life.
